dimensions.name: coverage
dimensions.evidence: `.furrow/rows/install-and-merge/definition.yaml` defines 4 deliverables, and `.furrow/rows/install-and-merge/plan.json` assigns each exactly once across waves 1-3 with no duplicates.

dimensions.name: feasibility
dimensions.evidence: Wave ordering in `.furrow/rows/install-and-merge/plan.json` respects all `depends_on` edges from `definition.yaml`, and wave 2 explicitly keeps `config-cleanup` and `worktree-reintegration-summary` on disjoint file ownership.

dimensions.name: specificity
dimensions.evidence: Every assignment in `.furrow/rows/install-and-merge/plan.json` includes a concrete `specialist` plus non-empty `file_ownership` globs, with consultants and skills also specified.

dimensions.name: research-grounding
dimensions.evidence: `.furrow/rows/install-and-merge/architecture-decisions.md` records AD-1 through AD-9 with explicit citations to concrete research files and sections, not just symbolic references.
